subject: checkout-api pod keeps restarting in prod
body: Since this morning the checkout-api deployment shows restarts climbing (47 and counting). kubectl get pods shows CrashLoopBackOff. Last deploy was yesterday 18:30. No logs visible when I run kubectl logs, it prints nothing and exits.

subject: New release won't start: ErrImagePull on payments service
body: Deployed payments v2.4.1 to staging and the pods never start. Events say Failed to pull image 'acrprodeu.azurecr.io/payments:v2.4.1': unauthorized. It worked last month. Nothing changed on our side that I know of.

subject: Nightly terraform pipeline failing with state lock error
body: The 02:00 infra pipeline fails with 'Error acquiring the state lock, state blob is already locked'. Yesterday someone cancelled a run halfway. Every run since then fails the same way.

subject: Grafana dashboards empty for the orders service
body: After migrating orders-svc to the new namespace, all its Grafana panels show No data. Prometheus targets page shows nothing for it at all. The app itself is healthy and serving traffic.

subject: API TLS errors from partner integrations
body: Partners report certificate has expired errors hitting api.example.com since 00:00 UTC. Browser shows NET::ERR_CERT_DATE_INVALID. cert-manager is installed but the Certificate shows Ready: False.

subject: Build queue stuck since the office move
body: All our release pipelines have been sitting in Queued state since Monday. The message says all potential agents are offline. Microsoft-hosted jobs run fine, it is only our own pool.
